basic_details.job_title: IIT ISM Dhanbad Research Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 01 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines), Dhanbad (IIT (ISM) Dhanbad)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines), Dhanbad (IIT (ISM) Dhanbad) Research Associate-I Notification 2026 has been released on 01 June 2026 on the official website iitism.ac.in. A total of 01 vacancy has been announced through the IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Research Associate-I Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech/M.E./MBA/M.Sc/Bachelor's Degree in Engineering or Technology or Medicine from a recognized University or equivalent.
qualification.details: Essential Qualification: M.Tech/M.E./MBA/M.Sc/Bachelor's Degree in Engineering or Technology or Medicine from a recognized University or equivalent.

salary_details.details: Rs. 58,000/- per month + 16% HRA TA/DA will be provided for outstation travel

how_to_apply: The candidates are required to submit a copy of their detailed resume with their photograph and enclose all relevant supporting documents regarding age, qualification, and experience through email [email protected] within the due date.
The candidates are also required to bring the original certificates and supporting documents for verification at the time of joining.
Shortlisted candidates will be informed for the date of interview.
important_instructions: Mere possession of minimum qualification does not guarantee an invitation to the interview. Candidates will be short listed based on their merit and as per the requirement of the project. All candidates should make their own arrangements for their stay at Dhanbad if required. No TA/DA will be paid to attend the interview.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Research Associate-I 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application is 10 June 2026 by 5:00 P.M. via email to [email protected].

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Research Associate at IIT ISM Dhanbad?
faq.answer: There is 01 vacancy for the Research Associate-I position under the Ministry of Tribal Affairs project.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for IIT (ISM) Dhanbad RA position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive Rs. 58,000/- per month plus 16% HRA along with TA/DA for outstation travel.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Research Associate-I recruitment at IIT ISM Dhanbad?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 35 years as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What qualification is required for IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Research Associate 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have M.Tech/M.E./MBA/M.Sc or Bachelor's Degree in Engineering/Technology/Medicine from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this IIT ISM project vacancy?
faq.answer: Applications must be sent via email with detailed resume and supporting documents to [email protected].

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Research Associate-I 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application is 10 June 2026 by 5:00 P.M. via email to rashmis@iitism.ac.in.
